daily_goals: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
have breakfast with Jennifer at 8:30 am, discussing the day’s agenda and his plans for the mayoral campaign
take a walk around Johnson Park from 9:30 am to 10:30 am, enjoying the fresh air and gathering his thoughts
sit at Hobbs Cafe from 11:00 am to 1:00 pm, reading a book and jotting down ideas for his campaign platform
have lunch at the cafe at 1:00 pm, possibly engaging with friends and neighbors to gather their thoughts and support for his run for mayor
return home around 2:30 pm to catch up on community news and prepare for his campaign announcements
spend some time in the garden from 3:30 pm to 4:30 pm, tending to the plants and enjoying some quiet time
have an early dinner with Jennifer at 5:00 pm
planning.current_scheduled_task: sleeping
